role_summary: the head of finance is responsible for the overall financial health, governance, and financial  strategy of the organization.
responsibilities: • define and implement financia l strategy aligned with business goals   • oversee accounting, finance, taxation, treasury, and compliance   • lead budgeting, forecasting, and performance management   • ensure strong internal controls and governance frameworks   • support strategic initiatives such as e xpansions, investments, and funding   • report financial performance to top management and board
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong strategic, leadership, and decision -making capabilities   • deep understanding of corporate finance and compliance
